title: Toyland® 53cm (21") Wild West Cowboy Rifle With Sound Effects - Role Play & Fancy Dress Toys - Ages 3+
features: Saddle up cow girls and boys for an imaginative and immersive Wild West adventure!
This rifle will be the perfect finishing touch to western themed playtime or fancy dress with its intricate attention to detail and real shooting sounds!
Press the trigger to put down bad guys and listen as the gun noises adds to the role play experience.
Grab your partner and get ready for instant playtime with batteries included! Not suitable for children under 3.
The toy gun measures 53cm in length. (21 inches)
